CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer when nepa_review_timeline_type__c is Expedited/Emergency AND nepa_record_completeness__c is below 100. Indicates that the 1.5x APA arbitrary-and-capricious risk multiplier was applied. Audit flag for legal review.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: APA risk penalty applied: expedited procedure + incomplete administrative record. Review completeness score and fill gaps immediately.
CustomField.label: Expedited Risk Penalty Applied
